title: Senior Teacher - Pratham Education Capital India - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Pratham Education Capital India - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Join the Pratham Education Capital India family as a Senior Teacher in Surat. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Pratham Education Capital India:
Pratham Education Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Support students with special educational needs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pratham Education Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
